title: notifications-mail — cache keys + tags
description: Suppression bloom filter for hot-path lookup + per-provider config caches.

keys.description: Bloom filter of suppressed email hashes for tenant. Read on every send (hot path). Bloom miss = definitely not suppressed; hit = fall through to DB check.
Paginated suppression list for admin UI. Warmed on admin page load.
Provider reachability cache (result of health probe). Reused by SendMailJob for pre-flight abort when provider is known-down.
Tenant-level defaults (sender identity, postal address, footer text) from settings.json. Read on every send.
